answer: Over the last five years, Austin construction permits have significantly declined. In 2018, there were 70,641 permits issued, but by 2022, this number had dropped to 19,883—a decrease of 71.9%. Each year saw a steady decline, with 2021 issuing 46,416 permits, 2020 issuing 54,452, and 2019 issuing 55,747 permits. This reflects a consistent downward trend in construction activity.
